sqlMap.select: select * from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#

select NumberOfPersonnel, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PersonnelTypeKey from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PersonnelAffiliation set
NumberOfPersonnel = #NumberOfPersonnel# NumberOfPersonnel = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#
delete from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#
sqlMap.select: select NumberOfPersonnel, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PersonnelTypeKey from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PersonnelTypeKey, NumberOfPersonnel from PersonnelAffiliation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PersonnelTypeKey = #PersonnelTypeKey#
